name: restaurant general managers managing 5–15 staff members tool
description: For restaurant general managers managing 5–15 staff members, inefficient scheduling causes overstaffing or understaffing. We automate scheduling instead of using manual spreadsheets.
target_audience: restaurant general managers managing 5–15 staff members
problem_solved: inefficient staff scheduling leading to overstaffing or understaffing

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual scheduling and time tracking spreadsheets
